programme.desc: Charlotte, a young architect, has lots of projects in mind. As well as her work, she is helping her partner Damien restore an old Provencal farmhouse. So when her entourage pesters her about her non-existent desire to have children, she invents a lie to get them off her back.

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Femmes De Science
programme.desc: Midwife, epidemiologist and professor of midwifery at Universite Paris Cite, Anne Chantry is the third midwife to become a university professor in France.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: ''Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Des Racines & Des Ailes
programme.desc: Along the Atlantic coast to the English Channel stretches a rich but fragile coastline. From the Vendee marshes to the Arcachon basin, passing through the bay of Saint-Malo and the fort of Fouras in Charente-Maritime, local actors are intensely involved in preserving nature and heritage.

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Cyprus offers a total change of scenery! To truly experience it, one must travel from east to west along the coast, visit ancient castles, monasteries, flower-filled villages, mountain resorts, forests... With its superb beaches and rich cultural heritage, there is something for everyone.

programme.title: Memoire(S) De Suisse Romande
programme.desc: As part of the Romandy Memoire(s) project, RTS has organised public screenings of archive footage in several different Swiss localities. An opportunity for the local population to relive their shared history.

programme.title: Memoire(S) De Suisse Romande
programme.desc: As part of the Romandy Memoire(s) project, RTS has organised public screenings of archive footage in several different Swiss localities. An opportunity for the local population to relive their shared history.

programme.title: Marianne
programme.desc: At a pet fair, Lucie, a young home help and volunteer worker at the local animal refuge is found dead following an anaphylactic shock. But everything points to murder. Very quickly, the investigation puts Marianne and her team on the trail of animal traffickers.

programme.title: Marianne
programme.desc: Jade, lead dancer in a cabaret, is found dead in a rubbish bin behind the night club. The ambitious Naomi, her main rival, is prime suspect. But Marianne also takes a close interest in Prudence, previously employed as a child-minder by the victim before being sacked for obscure reasons.

programme.title: Carbone
programme.desc: You might expect engineering experts to be addicted to hi-tech solutions. Professor Louise Millette proves the contrary by revealing her love of the humble washing line: an efficient, sustainable technology for everyone.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.title: C'Est Du Belge

programme.desc: Being better cared for, living longer and in good health: it is a universal hope. In Occitanie, amazing innovations are being developed. Among others: robots serving caregivers and patients, promising treatments against Alzheimer's disease, and even transplants for the blind.

programme.title: Les Rene Du Cinema
programme.desc: For this 15th edition, the great annual celebration of French speaking Belgian cinema is changing its name!
